zh.lifeSummary: 當Caroline Wheelock於1834年8月25日出生在美國紐約州阿爾班尼阿爾班尼時，她的父親Jothan Wheelock35歲，母親Hannah Warner32歲。她於1852年1月15日與Martin Cunningham在美國威斯康辛州文巴格奧申可申 堂文巴格結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她於1850年住在美國紐約州艾利蘭卡斯特且於1880年住在美國愛阿華州弗洛伊德弗洛伊德。她去世於1895年11月23日在美國愛阿華州享年61歲，埋葬在美國愛阿華州弗洛伊德弗洛伊德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Caroline Wheelock于1834年8月25日出生在美国纽约州阿爾班尼阿爾班尼时，她的父亲Jothan Wheelock35岁，母亲Hannah Warner32岁。她于1852年1月15日与Martin Cunningham在美国威斯康辛州文巴格奧申可申 堂文巴格结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她于1850年住在美国纽约州艾利蘭卡斯特且于1880年住在美国艾奥瓦州弗洛伊德弗洛伊德。她去世于1895年11月23日在美国艾奥瓦州享年61岁，埋葬在美国艾奥瓦州弗洛伊德弗洛伊德。

nameMeanings.name: Wheelock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Worcestershire and Staffordshire): habitational name from a place so named in Cheshire. The placename is derived from the river Wheelock; the river name means ‘winding river’, from British Suilāco-.

nameMeanings.name: Caroline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the French form of Latin or Italian Carolina , a feminine derivative of Carolus ( see Charles ). This name was used by certain gentry families from the 17th century onwards, no doubt in honour of the Stuart kings named Charles. It was famously borne by Lady Caroline Lamb ( 1785–1828 ), mistress of the poet Lord Byron .

historicEvents.title: Remember the Alamo
historicEvents.description: Being a monumental event in the Texas Revolution, The Battle of the Alamo was a thirteen-day battle at the Alamo Mission near San Antonio. In the early morning of the final battle, the Mexican Army advanced on the Alamo. Quickly being overrun, the Texian Soldiers quickly withdrew inside the building. The battle has often been overshadowed by events from the Mexican–American War, But the Alamo gradually became known as a national battle site and later named an official Texas State Shrine.
Historical Boundaries: 1855: Floyd, Iowa, United States
Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

historicEvents.title: Sorry Mr. President, You can't do that.
historicEvents.description: This Act was to restrict the power of the President removing certain office holders without approval of the Senate. It denies the President the power to remove any executive officer who had been appointed by the president with the advice and consent of the Senate, unless the Senate approved the removal during the next full session of Congress. The Amendment was later repealed.

historicEvents.title: The Burtis Opera House
historicEvents.description: The Burtis Opera House opened in Davenport and could easily hold an audience of 1,600. It was a widely used facility and Mark Twain filled the house when he spoke on tour in 1869. It was also used to house Susan B. Anthony when she lectured on the woman's right to vote. The Quad City Symphony Orchestra played its first concert as the new Tri-City Symphony in the Opera House. An arsonist set fire to the building on the evening of April 26, 1921, and the building was severely destroyed. The building was rebuilt but was no longer used as an opera house.

historicEvents.title: There is now a Capital Building
historicEvents.description: The capitol building in Des Moines originally had a budget of $1,500,000 but complications arose because of the need of a redesign. The building was dedicated on January 17, 1884, but it wasn’t completed until 1886. On January 4, 1904, a fire started and swept through the areas that housed the Supreme Court and Iowa House of Representatives. A major restoration was performed and documented, with the addition of electrical lighting, elevators, and a telephone system. By the early 1980s, the sandstone exterior of the Capitol had started deteriorating and prompted the installation of canopies to protect pedestrians from falling rubble. The entire reconstruction process took around 18 years to complete.
historicEvents.urlTitle: The History of the Iowa Capitol Building in Des Moines

en.lifeSummary: When Caroline Wheelock was born on 25 August 1834, in Albany, Albany, New York, United States, her father, Jothan Wheelock, was 35 and her mother, Hannah Warner, was 32. She married Martin Cunningham on 15 January 1852, in Winnebago, Oshkosh Town, Winnebago, Wisconsin, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She lived in Lancaster, Erie, New York, United States in 1850 and Floyd, Floyd, Iowa, United States in 1880. She died on 23 November 1895, in Iowa, United States, at the age of 61, and was buried in Floyd, Floyd, Iowa, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Caroline Wheelock est née le 25 août 1834, à Albany, Albany, New York, États-Unis, son père, Jothan Wheelock, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Hannah Warner, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Martin Cunningham le 15 janvier 1852, à Winnebago, Oshkosh Town, Winnebago, Wisconsin, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle a vécu à Lancaster, Erie, New York, États-Unis en 1850 et à Floyd, Floyd, Iowa, États-Unis en 1880. Elle est décédée le 23 novembre 1895, à Iowa, États-Unis, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Floyd, Floyd, Iowa, États-Unis.

Sie hat am 15. Januar 1852 in Winnebago, Oshkosh Town, Winnebago, Wisconsin, Vereinigte Staaten Martin Cunningham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1850 hat sie in Lancaster, Erie, New York, Vereinigte Staaten und 1880 in Floyd, Floyd, Iowa, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Sie starb am 23. November 1895 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Iowa, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Floyd, Floyd, Iowa, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Caroline Wheelock è nata il il 25 agosto 1834 nel Albany, Albany, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Jothan Wheelock, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Hannah Warner, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Martin Cunningham il 15 gennaio 1852, nel Winnebago, Oshkosh Town, Winnebago, Wisconsin, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Lancaster, Erie, New York, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1850 e nel Floyd, Floyd, Iowa, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1880. Morì il 23 novembre 1895, nel Iowa, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Floyd, Floyd, Iowa, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Caroline Wheelockが1834年8月25日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州アルバニーアルバニーで生まれた時，父Jothan Wheelockは35歳，母Hannah Warnerは32歳であった。1852年1月15日にアメリカ合衆国ウィスコンシン州ウィネバゴオシュコッシュ トウンウィネバゴでMartin Cunninghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1850年にはアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州エリーランカスターに，1880年にはアメリカ合衆国アイオワ州フロイドフロイドに住んでいた。彼女は1895年11月23日にアメリカ合衆国アイオワ州で61歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国アイオワ州フロイドフロイドにて埋葬された。

ko.Oshkosh, Winnebago, Wisconsin, United St: 미국 위스콘신 주 윈바고 오시코시 타운
ko.Winnebago, Oshkosh Town, Winnebago, Wisc: 미국 위스콘신 주 윈바고 오시코시 타운 윈바고
ko.lifeSummary: Caroline Wheelock(이)가 1834년 8월 25일 미국 뉴욕 주 알바니 알바니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jothan Wheelock(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hannah Warner(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1852년 1월 15일 미국 위스콘신 주 윈바고 오시코시 타운 윈바고에서 Martin Cunningham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1850년도에 미국 뉴욕 주 에리 랭커스터에서, 1880년도에 미국 아이오와 주 플로이드 플로이드에서 살았다. 그녀는 1895년 11월 23일 미국 아이오와 주에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 아이오와 주 플로이드 플로이드에 묻혔다.

pt.25 August 1834–23 November 1895: 25 de agosto de 1834–23 de novembro de 1895
pt.Oshkosh, Winnebago, Wisconsin, United St: Oshkosh Town, Winnebago, Wisconsin, Estados Unidos da América
pt.Lancaster, Erie, New York, United States: Lancaster, Erie, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América

pt.Northwood, Worth, Iowa: Northwood, Worth, Iowa, Estados Unidos da América
pt.Floyd, Floyd, Iowa, United States: Floyd, Floyd, Iowa, Estados Unidos da América
pt.New York, United States: Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Caroline Wheelock nasceu em 25 de agosto de 1834, em Albany, Albany, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Jothan Wheelock, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Hannah Warner, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Martin Cunningham em 15 de janeiro de 1852, em Winnebago, Oshkosh Town, Winnebago, Wisconsin, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela viveu em Lancaster, Erie, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América em 1850 e em Floyd, Floyd, Iowa, Estados Unidos da América em 1880. Ela faleceu em 23 de novembro de 1895, em Iowa, Estados Unidos da América, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Floyd, Floyd, Iowa, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Oshkosh, Winnebago, Wisconsin, United St: ошкош тоун, виннебаго, Висконсин, Соединенные штаты
ru.Winnebago, Oshkosh Town, Winnebago, Wisc: виннебаго, ошкош тоун, виннебаго, Висконсин, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Caroline Wheelock родилась 25 августа 1834 г. в местности албани, албани, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Jothan Wheelock было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Hannah Warner, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Martin Cunningham 15 января 1852 г. в местности виннебаго, ошкош тоун, виннебаго, Висконсин, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она жила в местности ланкастир, эри, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в 1850 году и в местности флоид, флоид, Айова, Соединенные штаты в 1880 году. Она умерла 23 ноября 1895 г. в местности Айова, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности флоид, флоид, Айова, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Caroline Wheelock nació el 25 de agosto de 1834, en Albany, Albany, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, su papá, Jothan Wheelock, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Hannah Warner, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Martin Cunningham el 15 de enero de 1852, en Winnebago, Oshkosh Town, Winnebago, Wisconsin, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Lancaster, Erie, Nueva York, Estados Unidos en 1850 y en Floyd, Floyd, Iowa, Estados Unidos en 1880. Murió el 23 de noviembre de 1895, en Iowa, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Floyd, Floyd, Iowa, Estados Unidos.
